value: Westerville is a suburb of Columbus, Ohio — the 14th largest city in the United States with a metro population of over 2.1 million. The Columbus MSA has experienced strong growth driven by a diversified employment base anchored by healthcare, education (Ohio State University), technology, logistics, and financial services. The submarket benefits from excellent school districts, proximity to Polaris employment center, and limited new multifamily supply relative to demand.

Hudson Square presents a value-add opportunity in one of Columbus's strongest submarkets. The property was built in 2013 and has received minimal capital investment. Our business plan centers on a $4,000/unit interior renovation and $967K exterior improvement program including dog park, pool renovation, fitness center upgrade, landscaping, and signage. Gray Residential will take over property management at close, implementing proven revenue management and operational efficiency programs. Post-renovation target rent premium of $150/unit.
